month. With the help of the Vimshottari system we can pin
point the time. Take the chart of a native born on 1920.1.22 at
11.06 A.M. UST). First tabulate when the aspects of and to the
luminaries, lagna, seventh house, and the tenth house are
formed. We have to tabulate them separately. Take the de
grees as years, and at the rate of five minutes per month
convert the minutes and second into months and days. Add
the figures to the date of birth.

120 Rectification of Birth Time
We use symbols for the aspects thus-conjunction ( ), op
position ( ), sextile ( ), semisquare and sesquiquad rate ( ),
quincux ( ), and parallel ( ). For the planets we use ( )
